creator: w.schwarzenfeld@aon.at
text:
Created attachment 166038
svn-diff_net_libzmq4-4.1.4

update libzmq4 to 4.1.4.

ChangeLog:
* Fixed  - socket monitor hangs if bind/setsockopt failed.
* Fixed  - assertion failure in tcp.cpp after network reconnect.
* Fixed  - build failure using latest libsodium.
* Fixed  - assertion failure in msg.cpp:390 on STREAM sockets.
* Fixed  - does not handle IPv6 link local addresses.

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zeromq/zeromq4-1/master/NEWS
